Introduction
    Years ago, young lovers Min Hui and Xin Qi split due to misunderstanding. He had heart condition. Reunited at event, they rekindle romance as successful professionals. But will love be rekindled or has chance passed?

Also known as: Tình Yêu Anh Dành Cho Em
